posts.author: DawnRuss (Dawn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I am trying to delete/remove an item from a board based on a status change on another board.

Currently i have do the following

Board X workflow states “if status changes from Completed move item to board Y”

I now need it to delete or move off board Y if the status changes on board X again.

Can this be done?

With thanks

Dawn

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DawnRuss! I don’t think it’s possible natively in Monday, but there is a Zapier step that might be able to help here:

delete item zap905×537 25.4 KB

This does require a paid Zapier subscription to do since it would be a multi-step zap. Let me know if you have any questions - feel free to reach out here on the forums or at greg@elevateops.io!
